case_title: FUNKY FUN, LLC. VS. LESMORE M. BARKER

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FUNKY FUN, LLC. DBA CHAMBERS EAT + DRINK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-20-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-20-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF FUNKY FUN, LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY THOMAS FLANNANGAN, OWNER AND WITH WITNESS ISABEL MANCHESTER. DEFENDANT LESMORE M. BARKER IS PRESENT. CASE RECESSED TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO ACCESS HIS ACCOUNT ON HIS COMPUTER AND VERIFY THE VALIDITY OF HIS EVIDENCE. WHEN CASE WAS RECALLED THE DEFENDANT NEVER CAME BACK. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-20-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FUNKY FUN, LLC. DBA CHAMBERS EAT + DRINK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LESMORE M. BARKER A.K.A. KESMORE BARKER $3,999.42 PRINCIPAL, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,184.42 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $135.00 SERVED FEB-13-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LESMORE M. BARKER A.K.A. KESMORE BARKER
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FUNKY FUN, LLC. DBA CHAMBERS EAT + DRINK
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER CASE COTINUED TO ALL DEFENDANT TO TIMELY REQUEST DEFENDANT'S ZOOM APPEARANCE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-20-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO TIMELY REQEUST APPEARANCE BY ZOOM. COURT DISCLOSURE IS GIVEN. PLAINTIFF FUNKY FUN, LLC REPRESETNED BY THOMAS FLANAGAN, OWNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LESMORE M. BARKER IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF FUNKY FUN, LLC. DBA CHAMBERS EAT + DRINK

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,999.42 FILED BY FUNKY FUN, LLC. DBA CHAMBERS EAT + DRINK AS TO DEFENDANT LESMORE M. BARKER A.K.A. KESMORE BARKER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-20-2021 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUN-24-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUANCE NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2021 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JUL-29-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FUNKY FUN LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY THOMAS FLANNAGAN, OWNER. DEFENDANT LESMORE M. BARKER AKA KESMORE BARKER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ISSUES. HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG REQUEST ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE FROM WELLS FARGO BANK. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
